SAP Data & Analytics
Product Marketing

Chris O'Hara is leading AI adoption and education for the Data & Analytics product marketing team at SAP. This 8-chapter curriculum covers the modern funnel in the agentic era.

Start Chapter 1 →

The Curriculum

Each chapter maps Pragmatic Framework activities to a stage of the modern B2B funnel, reframed for the agentic era. New chapters release weekly.

Live
Chapter One

The Old Playbook Is Dead

The foundational thesis. Why the agentic era ended the old B2B playbook and how the role of PMM must be reimagined.

📖 ~18 min read 📝 10 quiz questions
Coming Soon
Chapter Two

Building Signal in a Noisy World

Awareness & TOFU in the agentic era. GEO strategy, the new awareness stack, and getting cited by AI.

📖 Coming Week 2
Coming Soon
Chapter Three

Winning the Evaluation You Never See

Consideration & MOFU. Competitive positioning when the buyer's agent does the shortlisting.

📖 Coming Week 3
Coming Soon
Chapter Four

Closing in the Age of the Informed Buyer

Decision & BOFU. Sales enablement and pricing strategy when buyers arrive pre-educated.

📖 Coming Week 4
Coming Soon
Chapter Five

Time-to-Value Is the Only Metric

Onboarding & post-sale. Accelerating activation and proving ROI faster than ever.

📖 Coming Week 5
Coming Soon
Chapter Six

The Revenue You Already Have

Retention & NRR. Expansion strategy and preventing churn in the age of easy switching.

📖 Coming Week 6
Coming Soon
Chapter Seven

Your Customers Are Your Content Engine

Advocacy & the flywheel. Turning customers into the proof points that agents surface.

📖 Coming Week 7
Coming Soon
Chapter Eight

The 10x PMM Operating System

Capstone. Putting it all together — your personal system for operating at 10x.

📖 Coming Week 8
